title: RailsRemoteEventsEnvelope
description: A far node's rail-event push. Source: POST /api/missioncontrol/rails/remote-events body (holdspeak/rails_observer.py, Phase 88). EVENTS ONLY: no repo file bodies cross the wire (a body-carrying event is refused); each event is stamped with its origin node and honest liveness applies.

items.description: a raw dw event; must NOT carry a file body (text/body/body_markdown/content/file/contents)
